mentions.note: Down 23% YTD, yields 4%, trades 13x earnings with low single-digit growth. Once-revered company now disfavored in capital allocation shift toward data center.
Reports Wednesday morning; down 23% YTD after being long-term winner; medical device group (Boston Scientific -50%) so weak Cramer won't pre-quarter recommend despite pullback.
Medical device leader hit new lows; part of broad medical/healthcare sector selloff.
